title: beyerdynamic AVENTHO 100 Wireless On-Ear Headphones with ANC in Black
features: High-quality materials, replacable ear-pads and foldable design
description: Product Description Iconic Look. Uncompromised Sound. Iconic design meets an uncompromising sound experience. These wireless on-ear headphones offer a perfect symbiosis of smart features and timeless aesthetics – because clever technologies now also set visual standards. Winner of the Red Dot Award , the headphones feature premium materials, a foldable design, and an extra-long battery life . The AVENTHO 100 gives you peace whenever you need it, combined with pure soundscapes – with zero compromises. Award-winning Design for Your Everyday Life Winner of the Red Dot Award , the AVENTHO 100 makes a stylish statement in three colours. Premium materials ensure durability – as do the replaceable ear pads. Its lightweight on-ear fit and foldable housing make it the perfect companion. Hear What you Want to Hear With active noise cancellation (ANC), you can enjoy peace and quiet whenever you need it. When needed, your surroundings can be brought back in at the touch of a button. Excellent voice clarity ensures that every conversation is a pleasure. More Sound. Fewer Charging Breaks. The AVENTHO 100 won't let you down. Up to 60 hours of battery life without ANC and up to 40 hours with active noise cancellation. And when you're in a hurry: just 15 minutes of charging gives you up to 15 hours of listening pleasure. Smart Features Meet Timeless Aesthetics Enjoy uncompromising sound for everything that gets you through the day. And because great sound can be smart too: with Google Fast Pair , you're connected in seconds. With multipoint, it can even connect to your devices simultaneously. Adapts to You. Not the Other Way Round. Use the beyerdynamic app to personalise your AVENTHO 100 to suit your needs. Adjust the active noise cancellation (ANC) to your preferences, get firmware updates, and always stay up to date – all via your smartphone. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading.
